evidence: spot_engine.close_spot logs/deletes but never calls record_closed_trade or analyze_closed_trade; spot attribution rows=0
impact: recent live spot trades do not teach the bot
propagation: no snapshots; no attribution; no retrain increments; no RBI incubation feedback
recommended_fix: wire spot close path into learning_loop and post_trade_analyzer immediately

evidence: spot_edge_conditions rows=0; no calibrator events; latest nightly report lacks spot_edge_calibration
propagation: runtime falls back to permissive config
recommended_fix: schedule/run calibrator for real and fail closed when calibration is stale or empty

evidence: calibrator joins scan_candidates to SELL timestamps within 300s and exact symbol; only 68/139 live spot sells match
impact: derived edge dataset is badly incomplete
recommended_fix: rebuild calibrator join on entry lineage or candidate_id/base_asset plus entry timestamp

evidence: entry priors use hit_1r and no hit_stop over candidate_outcomes; live spot exits mostly thesis_decay
impact: priors optimize wrong target for a fast fee-sensitive scalp
propagation: economics gate can admit trades with poor fast-follow-through expectancy
recommended_fix: change priors to fast net follow-through / thesis-decay aware targets

evidence: priors bucket by scanner primary_setup while spot engine trades setup_family; recent mappings are ranging_mr->pullback_reclaim and momentum->pullback_reclaim
impact: learning buckets do not line up with execution buckets
propagation: feedback cannot refine the actual live gate cleanly
recommended_fix: store and learn on both scanner setup and spot setup_family, with a canonical live setup key

evidence: signal_engine._get_ml_score calls ModelStore without symbol; model files stale from 2026-04-13
impact: ML score is generic and stale
recommended_fix: pass symbol through inference and retrain fresh models after backfill

evidence: repo search shows no callers of record_outcome or get_online_adjustment
propagation: repeated weak trade patterns are not downweighted quickly
recommended_fix: either wire online learner into close/inference path or remove it from the mental model

evidence: min_confirm_count=0; min_5m_frame=0; min_path=0; most entries opportunistic pullback_reclaim with avg setup_score ~0.28
impact: advanced spot math is mostly advisory
propagation: weak entries dominate and exits become cleanup
recommended_fix: make setup_score and selected derivative features real edge gates again

evidence: recent entered spot regimes: NEUTRAL 117, CHOP 24, TREND 2
impact: bot behaves more like neutral reclaim engine than burst-rider
propagation: strategy philosophy diverges from intended scalp style
recommended_fix: either embrace neutral reclaim explicitly or shift live admission toward burst/TREND-follow-through logic

evidence: avg gross pnl before fees -0.0490; avg round-trip fee 1.1349; net win rate 0%
impact: fees convert weak gross edge into universal net losses
propagation: route and economics layer cannot rescue poor pre-fee move quality
recommended_fix: optimize for net-of-fee fast expectancy and suppress setups whose gross edge is too small

evidence: taker_fallback 84 closes vs maker_first 55; taker avg net -1.9144; maker avg net -1.5646
propagation: capital churn increases with low-quality fallback fills
recommended_fix: require stronger evidence for taker or move to maker-dominant execution for marginal setups

evidence: 49/143 recent entered spot candidates used PF_ symbols; SOL 22/33, ETH 18/20
impact: spot execution inherits non-spot scanner context
propagation: lineage, priors, and microstructure assumptions become fragile
recommended_fix: persist canonical base-asset lineage and clearly separate scanner symbol from executed symbol

evidence: nightly audit queries ml_retrain_queue.status which does not exist, then reports pass
impact: operator is misled about retrain health
propagation: queue fragmentation and pending work can be missed
recommended_fix: fix audit query to current schema and report normalized pending counts

evidence: learning_health passes on legacy/global snapshots; attribution coverage reports absurd percentages
recommended_fix: split audit by lane and by current strategy epoch; tighten truth contracts
